model_routing.economy: manual fallback in current Codex session; use for metadata and validation
model_routing.frontier: active Codex model from doctor output when available; reserve for Chairman and hard contradictions
model_routing.standard: manual fallback in current Codex session; use for ordinary memos and reviews
model_routing.verified_environment: Codex Doctor observed model gpt-5.5 on this workstation; per-agent model keys are not guaranteed by local TOML support.

question: What current commercial model should govern future restaurant direct-ordering product development, sales materials, ROI reports, pricing, and pilot work?

role_briefs.contrarian: Find how the proposal fails and what evidence would defeat each objection.
role_briefs.executor: Map dependencies, ownership, support burden, failure criteria, and next action.
role_briefs.expansionist: Identify upside and reusable leverage without pricing speculation as fact.
role_briefs.first-principles: Decompose the decision into load-bearing claims and rebuild from constraints.
role_briefs.outsider: Compare against doing nothing and low-cost substitutes from buyer perspective.

title: Full Commercial Recalibration, ROI, Product, and Pricing
